{{Quote|Sgt. Falesh! I want a task force out sweeping the delta-seven section... I got a trace on those guerrillas... and I want them dead.|Ryko Vant|<ref name="dkd" />}}
[[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] '''Falesh''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Imperial officer]] serving under [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Ryko Vant]] on [[Jerne]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Stationed at [[Jerne City H.Q.]], Falesh was placed in charge of some of the search efforts after Vant's cohort was attacked by native guerrillas, causing Vant to lose hold of prized [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] captives [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]].<ref name="dkd" />
